scripts.build: bun run sync:sidecars && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.release:preflight: bun run sync:sidecars && bun run scripts/release-preflight.mjs --mode=unsigned
scripts.release:preflight:signed: bun run sync:sidecars && bun run scripts/release-preflight.mjs --mode=signed
scripts.release:preflight:notarized: bun run sync:sidecars && bun run scripts/release-preflight.mjs --mode=notarized
scripts.release:build:unsigned: bun run sync:sidecars && bun run scripts/release-build.mjs --mode=unsigned
scripts.release:build:signed: bun run sync:sidecars && bun run scripts/release-build.mjs --mode=signed
scripts.release:build:notarized: bun run sync:sidecars && bun run scripts/release-build.mjs --mode=notarized
